channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Amazon Says Its Cloud Facilities Were Disrupted Again Due to War in Iran
item.description: Iran has said American big tech is a new target.

item.title: Arm Is Now Making Its Own Chips
item.description: The chip design firm says Meta, OpenAI, Cerebras, and Cloudflare are among the first customers of its new artificial intelligence hardware.

item.title: Welp, I bought an iPhone again
item.description: It takes a week to switch phones. First, there's the technical process of moving eSIMs across devices, which takes either a few minutes (if you're switching from one Android phone to another) or two days, a half-dozen calls to Verizon, a verification text message sent to your mom, and approximately 11,000 restarts of your phone […]

item.title: Apple Music partners with Ticketmaster to power its concert discovery feature
item.description: Apple Music teamed up with Ticketmaster to power its Concert Discovery feature, which recommends live music events based on users' listening habits.

item.title: 'Traces of unauthorized access': Mazda confirms data breach exposing employee and partner data — here's what we know
item.description: A handful of Mazda records were exfiltrated - but no one has claimed responsibility yet.

item.title: This Chip Could Fix the Fukushima Plant’s Wi-Fi Problem
item.description: The ultimate goal is to devise a fully wireless, durable communication device that functions deep within a nuclear plant, the team said.

item.title: Pokémon Champions will hit Switch and Switch 2 on April 8
item.description: Pokémon Champions — a battle-focused game along the lines of Pokémon Stadium — now has a release date, and it's pretty darn soon. It will hit Nintendo Switch and Switch 2 on April 8. A mobile version is in the works with support for cross-play with Nintendo's consoles.Nintendo released a new overview video that shows how the game works. You can recruit Pokémon in the game or transfer those you've found in previous titles and Pokémon Go via Pokémon Home. Then you'll be able to take half a dozen of your Pokémon into strategic turn-based fights with other players. It's definitely a Pokémon battle...

item.title: Un miracle à 60 000 km de la Terre : le satellite européen Proba-3 rétablit le contact après un mois d’errance
item.description: L'Agence spatiale européenne retient son souffle. Perdu depuis la mi-février suite à une grave anomalie technique, l'un des deux satellites de la mission solaire Proba-3 a finalement repris contact avec la Terre. Une opération de sauvetage inespérée qui relance l'espoir de poursuivre cette mission scientifique inédite.

item.title: Fine, I'll buy another copy of Clair Obscur Expedition 33 to snag this special Mirror Edition
item.description: The Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 – Mirror Edition is now available to pre-order in the UK exclusively at Amazon, and as a huge fan of the game, I'm unable to resist.

item.title: On a conduit la nouvelle Xiaomi SU7 électrique : la pire ennemie de Tesla devient encore meilleure avec 900 km d’autonomie
item.description: Nous avons eu la chance de conduire la nouvelle Xiaomi SU7 restylée, la voiture électrique aux 900 km d'autonomie au compteur. Après 220 km parcourus autour de Pékin, voici notre premier avis sur cette concurrente hors normes aux Tesla Model 3 à la nouvelle BMW Série 3 électrique.

item.title: 5 Questions We Need Answered in the ‘Paradise’ Season 2 Finale
item.description: All hell's breaking loose inside the bunker, and there's only one episode left to sort everything out and set up season three.

item.title: Stop telling AI it's an expert programmer, you're making it worse at its job — new research shows the best results need specific prompts
item.description: Stop telling AI how it should generate answers – focus more on asking what you want of it, and giving it the necessary context.

item.title: 'Welcome back, Frank': Marvel confirms the official title for The Punisher TV Special on Disney+ — and it'll be released a week after the Daredevil: Born Again season 2 finale
item.description: The launch date and official title for the Jon Bernthal-starring Disney+ special presentation have been unveiled.

item.title: Is the live-action ‘Moana’ a new low for Disney remakes? Why the internet dubbed it ‘the most insulting one so far’
item.description: The trailer just dropped for the upcoming movie starring Dwayne ‘The Rock’ Johnson—and critics are pointing out questionable choices. In 2015, Disney discovered a new way to cash in on nostalgia: live-action remakes of its classic animated films. That started with Cinderella, brought back to the big screen 65 years after the original movie premiered. In the decade since, Disney has released 12 more of those remakes, with the gap between the original films’ release dates and the remakes growing shorter and shorter. The next entry is a remake of 2016’s Moana coming to theaters this July, a few m...

item.title: Best website builders
item.description: We have everything you'll possibly need to know about the best website builders available on the market.

item.title: A BlackBerry you might actually want just landed on Kickstarter
item.description: When The Verge's Allison Johnson went hands-on with the company's Titan 2 Elite phone at MWC 2026, Unihertz didn't divulge pricing info. But the compact Android phone with a BlackBerry-inspired keyboard is now available for preorder through a Kickstarter crowdfunding campaign and starts at $489, with a discount for early backers bringing it down to […]...

item.title: Décès de Lionel Jospin : comment il a initié la transition du Minitel vers Internet
item.description: Décédé le 22 mars 2026, l'ancien Premier ministre a mené une politique active dès 1997 pour faciliter le passage du Minitel à Internet en France.

item.title: The Punisher's one-off TV special hits Disney+ on May 12
item.description:
We knew Disney+ was prepping a standalone special for The Punisher, but we didn't know it was coming so soon. The Punisher: One Last Kill premieres on May 12. This is just one week after the season two finale of Daredevil: Born Again, which starts up this week. It's possible The Punisher will be featured in that, so we could be in for eight straight weeks of skull-shirted shenanigans. Frank Castle returns in A Marvel Television Special Presentation: The Punisher: One Last Kill May 12, only on @DisneyPlus. pic.twitter.com/4I3H10grXz— The Punisher (@ThePunisher) March 24, 2026
One Last Kill was...

item.title: I’m a big fan of FlexiSpot’s single monitor arm for freeing up desk space, and it’s just $30 in Amazon’s Spring Sale
item.description: Forget buying a bigger desk, FlexiSpot’s single monitor arm frees up space and it's half-price in Amazon’s Spring sale, now just $30.

item.title: Xbox indie program lead says Project Helix will be 'easier' for developers and that Microsoft is 'working hard so developers can make one Xbox build in the future' that will run on everything
item.description: Xbox portfolio and programs general manager Chris Charla has said Project Helix will be easier for developers to work with, but advises studios to prioritize developing their games for current gen and PC first.

item.title: I trapped a clone of my boss on a desert island in Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream — and it only got weirder from there
item.description: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream had me tormenting a virtual version of my TechRadar boss.

item.title: C’est un Steam Deck ? Non, c’est l’AYN Odin 2, une console portable en promo à -28 % qui est capable d’émuler jusqu’à la Nintendo Switch
item.description: Si vous cherchez une console pour jouer à tous les jeux qui ont bercé votre enfance, qu'elle soit dans les années 80, 90 ou même 2000, vous avez la AYN Odin 2 en promo pour 287,17 euros au lieu de 399 euros sur AliExpress.

item.title: Elon Musk Will Have to Face the Music in Lawsuit Over DOGE’s Government Overreach
item.description: A federal judge allowed key parts of a lawsuit accusing Musk of wielding significant government power without Senate confirmation to move forward.

item.title: Two streaming services are better than one — this is your last chance to score this Disney+ and Hulu bundle and pay $15 for three months
item.description: This Disney+ and Hulu bundle ends today, so grab it while you can!

item.title: How the best cultures operate like open kitchens
item.description: The ‘backstage’ and ‘front stage’ should operate as one. There’s a restaurant in New York City called Rosa Mexicana that positions itself as a fresh take on Mexican cuisine. It’s upscale, well curated, and delicious. However, my favorite part about the dining experience is when you order guacamole, the wait-staff wheels out a little cart, draped in the traditional Mexican cloth, a vibrant sarape, and staked with fresh ingredients—avocados, lime, onion, salt, all the things. And as they arrive at your table, they make the guacamole right there in front of you. It’s quite the show, and it makes ...

item.title: The Tiny SIM Card Powering Smart Farming, And Why It's Becoming a Must-Have on U.S. Fields
item.description: ... farming, linking sensors, irrigation, and ... The Internet of Things, IoT, in industry shorthand, has moved from hype to hardware in agriculture.

item.title: Arnaque au faux conseiller bancaire : ces faux pas à éviter pour se faire rembourser
item.description: En cas d'escroquerie bancaire, les banques sont bien contraintes de rembourser les victimes sauf si ces dernières ont fait preuve de négligence grave... ce qui est le cas lorsqu'un client va jusqu'à donner sa carte bancaire et son code confidentiel à un faux coursier, a rappelé un jugement du 11 mars dernier du tribunal judiciaire de Paris. Il en est de même si on valide une opération de paiement présentée par l'escroc comme une annulation. Ce même si l'arnaque a débuté avec le numéro de téléphone usurpé de la banque....

item.title: Louisiana researchers have made a nail polish that turns your fingernail into a phone stylus to solve ‘zombie finger’ problems
item.description: Two Louisiana researchers made a nail polish that turns your fingernail into a phone stylus.

item.title: Boost internet speeds from $87 with 6 super-fast TP-Link Wi-Fi 7 router deals in Amazon's early Spring Sale
item.description: From compact single-router upgrades to advanced whole-home mesh systems, Amazon's Spring Prime Day sale has a wealth of Wi-Fi router deals.

item.title: There's a new Payday game, this time in VR
item.description:
The popular co-op heist franchise Payday is coming to VR. Payday: Aces High will release for the Meta Quest platform and SteamVR later this year. It looks like it has everything people love about the series, but with some of that VR-style immersion. Just like the mainline games, this version tasks players with planning and then pulling off elaborate heists. It offers four-player co-op, with each person filling a particular role within the group. These are your standard heist movie archetypes. There's the planner, the brawler, the gadget nerd and the silent but deadly assassin.
The developer a...

item.title: How Many Times Can You Clone a Clone? New Research Offers a Surprising Answer
item.description: The practice of cloning clones indefinitely appears to be a reproductive dead end, for now.

item.title: Life is Strange: Reunion is a full-circle moment for its stars
item.description: Fans thought they were done with the original Life is Strange duo of Max and Chloe. Following the first game and its 2017 prequel, players said their tearful goodbyes to these beloved characters - or so they thought. Following Max Caulfield's abrupt return in 2024's Double Exposure, this week sees the unlikely return of Chloe […]

item.title: Google’s Android Automotive is moving from the dashboard to the ‘brain’ of the car
item.description: Google announced a new version of its Android Automotive open-source operating system for software-defined vehicles. Whereas previously Android Automotive operated exclusively in the car's infotainment system, Google is now expanding its "open infrastructure" to the non-safety parts of the car's internal computer system. As cars have swiftly become "computers on wheels," there is still a […]...

item.title: Meet the former Apple designer building a new AI interface at Hark
item.description: The company said it would design models, hardware, and interfaces in tandem to deliver a "seamless end-to-end personal intelligence product."

item.title: Nvidia RTX 5090 buyer is literally cleaned out as box contains no GPU, just laundry detergent — a reminder to be careful out there
item.description: GPU scams have involved replacing the graphics card with rocks or lumps of metal in the past, but this is a new one.

item.title: How to watch Power: The Downfall of Huw Edwards online from anywhere — it's *FREE*
item.description: A real-life story of abuse, power, and the fight for justice from the victim's perspective. Here's how to watch Power: The Downfall of Huw Edwards for FREE.

item.title: Spotify : la fonction SongDNA dévoile les liens entre les chansons que vous aimez
item.description: D'abord disponible pour les artistes, Spotify déploie SongDNA à d'autres utilisateurs. L'occasion de comprendre ce qui relie vos musiques préférées.

item.title: This Ford recall involves a feature you probably rely on every day
item.description: The issue can be repaired over the air, but only if drivers know their vehicle is affected. Another day, another Ford Motor Co. recall. This time, the company is recalling 254,640 vehicles due to a potential issue with the rearview camera image.

item.title: Epic Games licencie 1 000 employés, son patron s’explique
item.description: Coup dur pour les salariés d'Epic Games. Après les licenciements de 2023, voici que 1 000 postes supplémentaires sont supprimés.

item.title: Quelles ampoules connectées choisir pour votre éclairage en 2026 ?
item.description: Les ampoules connectées représentent le point de départ idéal pour s’initier à la domotique. Installer un éclairage intelligent chez soi est bien plus facile qu’on ne l’imagine. Découvrez dans notre comparatif les différentes ampoules intelligentes disponibles sur le marché.

item.title: Economists calculated exactly how much Trump tariffs will cost you in 2026—and who is paying the most
item.description: The total cost depends heavily on several factors, including your income level, your household size, and where you live in the country. The majority of President Trump’s tariffs were struck down earlier this year by the Supreme Court, but a number remain in place, with the threat of higher tariffs still to come. While the importers of tariffed goods are the ones who pay the actual tariff costs up front, they generally pass the cost of those tariffs onto you, the consumer, through higher prices....

item.title: Apple Maps will introduce ads this summer
item.description: Apple will soon allow businesses to buy advertisements in its Maps app. In an announcement on Tuesday, Apple says ads may appear at the top of your search results in Maps, as well as in a new "Suggested Places" list. They will arrive in-app in the US and Canada this summer. The company describes its […]

item.title: Encore un mauvais signe pour OnePlus : celui qui niait un démantèlement ne travaille plus chez OnePlus
item.description: Le patron de OnePlus Inde qui niait les rumeurs d'un démantèlement de la marque a quitté ses fonctions. En parallèle, sa présence médiatique en France s'amoindrit.

item.title: Publicité dans l’app Plans : Apple vend désormais les meilleures places
item.description: La rumeur disait vrai : la pub va bien faire son apparition dans l'application Plans. Apple en profite pour dévoiler une nouvelle offre de services à destination des entreprises, entièrement gratuite, pour faciliter le déploiement d'appareils de la marque… et acheter de la réclame dans Plans, donc.

item.title: Epic is laying off more than 1,000 workers, citing a downturn in Fortnite engagement
item.description: Epic Games has announced sweeping layoffs of more than 1,000 employees. “The downturn in Fortnite engagement that started in 2025 means we're spending significantly more than we're making, and we have to make major cuts to keep the company funded,” CEO Tim Sweeney said in a memo to workers on Tuesday. Sweeney wrote that, combined with “over $500 million of identified cost savings in contracting, marketing, and closing some open roles,” the layoffs will give Epic more stability. He added that the layoffs are not related to AI. Back in 2023, Epic laid off 830 employees. At the time, that was 16...

item.title: Exclusive: Get 4 months extra + up to $50 Amazon gift card with NordVPN
item.description: Lowest price of 2026: Lock in our exclusive rate before it expires.

item.title: Oura’s Next Smart Ring Just Leaked a Year Early
item.description: If these images are real, this is the first look at the Oura Ring 5.

item.title: Shark devices on sale ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale: Stick vacuums, stain removers, hair tools
item.description: Some of our favorite Shark products are on sale at Amazon ahead of the Big Spring Sale: Get 25% off the Shark StainForce or Shark FlexStyle.

item.title: FDA Recalls Nearly 90,000 Children’s Ibuprofen Bottles Over ‘Gel-Like Mass’
item.description: The recalled products come in a berry flavor and were distributed nationwide.

item.title: Cet antivol en acier de 500 grammes va devenir le pire cauchemar des voleurs de batterie de vélos électriques
item.description: Le Katt’fix ajoute une couche de sérénité pour les cyclistes peureux de laisser leurs vélos électriques dehors, par le biais d’un antivol de batterie compatible avec de très nombreux modèles.

item.title: How AI is reshaping compliance: Why governance still matters
item.description: As AI introduces regulatory and governance challenges, compliance frameworks are critical to managing enterprise risk.

item.title: ‘Avatar: Fire and Ash’ Is Finally Coming Home Next Week
item.description: The third entry in James Cameron's sci-fi saga will be available digitally March 31, ahead of its Blu-ray release in May.

item.title: This Microsoft security team stress-tests AI for its worst-case scenarios
item.description: The company’s Red Team simulates attacks to uncover risks before bad actors do. As soon as new AI products are released, security researchers and pranksters begin probing them for weaknesses, trying to push systems to violate their own safety precautions and coax them into producing anything from offensive content to instructions for building weapons....

item.title: Il aspire, démêle et lave : ce Dyson V12s Detect Submarine perd de 270 € pour nettoyer vos intérieurs de fond en comble
item.description: Le Dyson V12s Detect Submarine propose une bonne puissance d'aspiration et permet non seulement d'aspirer mais aussi de laver. Son prix passe de 719 euros à 449 euros sur Rakuten.

item.title: The best deals under $25 ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale — save on Lego, Fire Sticks, and more
item.description: Have a look through our selection of the best deals under $25 available to shop now at Amazon ahead of its 2026 Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Oracle is revamping how businesses procure AI agents — leave the invoices to AI while you handle the negotiations
item.description: Oracle has just added 22 new Fusion Agentic Applications to help finance, HR, supply chain and customer experience leaders.

item.title: 14 kg et USB-C : on a roulé avec l’Ampler Curt, un vélo électrique qui se recharge avec le câble de votre smartphone
item.description: Modernisé, l’Ampler Curt 2026 participe à la progressive démocratisation de la recharge USB-C chez la marque estonienne, et se bonifie grâce à une nouvelle fourche carbone ainsi qu’un nouvel univers connecté. Nous avons pu rouler avec au salon CyclingWorld 2026.

item.title: Crimson Desert fonctionne avec les cartes graphiques Intel finalement, mais avec plein de bugs
item.description: Nouvelles excuses de la part des développeurs de Crimson Desert après le tollé des joueurs possédant un PC avec une carte graphique Intel.

item.title: Epic Games cuts 1,000 jobs, says Fortnite engagement is down
item.description: Epic Games also increased the price of V-Bucks, the Fortnite in-game currency.

item.title: How AI will collide with data readiness
item.description: Generative and agentic AI hype has convinced many organizations to invest big and jump headfirst into the latest advances of the technology without necessarily considering the big picture.

item.title: Asus s’apprête à faire flamber le prix de ses PC portables (et ils ne seront pas les seuls)
item.description: Si vous comptiez changer d'ordinateur cette année, ne traînez pas. Les géants de la tech, Asus en tête, préparent une hausse historique de leurs tarifs pouvant atteindre les 30 %. En cause : une pénurie féroce de composants qui vide dangereusement les stocks des constructeurs.

item.title: Étranglé par le prix de la mémoire, Ayaneo suspend les précommandes de sa prochaine console portable
item.description: La hausse vertigineuse des prix des composants mémoire oblige Ayaneo à suspendre les précommandes de sa nouvelle console portable sous Windows, la Next 2. Un appareil qui n'était pourtant pas donné : le prix de la version de base était en effet de… 1 799 $.

item.title: Pokémon Champions is coming to the Nintendo Switch on April 8th
item.description: Right now, Pokopia has everyone busy building houses and beautifying the world, but next month, we'll be making our pocket monster friends fight for sport in Pokémon Champions. Today, Nintendo and The Pokémon Company announced that Pokémon Champions is set to make its debut on the Nintendo Switch family of consoles on April 8th before […]

item.title: Regional data sovereignty in the age of AI: Balancing innovation and regulation
item.description: Navigating innovation, regulation, and sovereignty as enterprises build resilient AI-ready data architectures worldwide.

item.title: Neuroscience says this is what really happens to your brain when you don’t get enough sleep
item.description: Don’t sleep on sleep. It’s part of what makes everything else possible. I’m so tired. However, the reasons are good:

item.title: 15+ Ninja kitchen deals to shop before the Amazon Big Spring Sale
item.description: Take up to 41% off Ninja Kitchen appliances like air fryers, blenders, and countertop ovens before the Amazon Big Spring Sale.

item.title: This new FCC rule could upend the router market
item.description: Citing national security risks, regulators plan to block new foreign-made devices, even as most U.S. routers are built overseas. Finding additional memory for your PC is already a challenge. Now, connecting to the internet could get tougher, too.

item.title: Flighty’s new update gives you real-time alerts about airport disturbances
item.description: Flighty's new feature will give users real-time updates about why operations at an airport are disrupted.
